bead.title: TD housekeeping: hygiene-bead AC TD-NNN substitution + migration survey across active+archive+cross-repo
bead.description:
Sibling of ddx-673833f4. After the TD lands with a real TD-NNN number, two housekeeping tasks:

1. Substitute the real TD-NNN reference in the AC text of all 5 hygiene beads (currently they say 'TD-NNN NoChangesContract' etc. with placeholder). Beads to patch: ddx-b24e9630, ddx-3c154349, ddx-aede917d, ddx-c6e3db02, ddx-da11a34a.

2. Migration survey: enumerate ALL persisted statuses across:
   - Active beads.jsonl in this DDx repo (verified today: only open/in_progress/closed)
   - Archive .ddx/beads-archive.jsonl (untested; likely many old beads with possibly non-canonical statuses)
   - Cross-repo: ~/Projects/agent (Fizeau bead store), ~/Projects/axon (axon bead store)

If non-canonical statuses surface anywhere, file a child migration bead. Otherwise document as no-op.
bead.acceptance: 1. All 5 hygiene beads have their AC text updated to substitute 'TD-NNN' with the concrete TD number (e.g., 'TD-026 NoChangesContract'). 2. Migration survey output captured under .ddx/executions/<run-id>/migration-survey.md showing distinct statuses per repo + active/archive split. 3. If non-canonical statuses exist anywhere, child migration bead filed and linked in the survey doc. 4. If no non-canonical statuses, survey doc explicitly notes 'no migration needed'.
